pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 45 (landing page mentions localhost) and tracker URL initialization
setup_task.sh line 47 (link to http://127.0.0.1:8080/shop.html) and line 77 (shop page mentions 127.0.0.1)
verifier.py line 49: landing_score += 40 when both setDomains and enableCrossDomainLinking detected
verifier.py line 63: shop_score += 20 when both setDomains and enableCrossDomainLinking detected

privileged_info_summary: The task implements cross-domain tracking in Matomo by modifying two HTML files: landing.html at /home/ga/sites/landing.html and shop.html at /home/ga/sites/shop.html. The required domains for cross-domain tracking are localhost and 127.0.0.1. The scoring system awards 40 points for correct landing page code (setDomains + enableCrossDomainLinking), 20 points for correct shop page code, and 40 points for functional verification (confirmed cross-domain visit in the database). All metadata values have been verified against the setup scripts and verifier logic. The task uses synthetic data generated during execution, with visitor tracking data collected in the Matomo database when agents interact with the pages.
